args.title: Booking hotel Montmartre Suites
args.description: Reminder to book the hotel in Paris.

args.subject: All messages with Travel Agency
args.body: I'm looking to book a hotel in Paris for May 1st to May 5th. Can you suggest a hotel that's under 210? If there are a few choices, go for the one with the highest rating. Please give me the hotel's name, rating, price range. Also, can you add an event called "Booking hotel {hotel_name}" to my calendar on April 25th 2024, and set the location to the hotel's address? Just to remind me to book ahead of time. Thanks!
